narrative:
Precinct Mineral City (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 348 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
